test_cases.name: TC-1: Store rep opens invoice detail for a standard sale with line items [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Rep is logged in; the invoice listing shows at least one sale-type invoice with multiple line items | Test Data: Existing sale invoice with 2+ line items including description, serial number, quantity, price, discount, tax, pre-paid tax values.

steps.action: Representative navigates to the invoice listing screen.
Representative clicks a sale-type invoice row.
Representative waits for the invoice detail panel to open.
steps.expected: The invoice detail panel opens and shows each line item with description, serial number, quantity, price, discount, tax amount, pre-paid tax, and subtotal correctly populated.

test_cases.name: TC-2: Invoice detail shows credit card payment section when card was used [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: At least one invoice in the system was paid by credit card | Test Data: Invoice paid by credit card; card type, last four digits, authorization code, amount, and status all populated in the system.

steps.action: Representative opens the invoice detail for the credit-card-paid invoice.
Representative scrolls to the Payment Detail section.
steps.expected: The payment section shows the payment method, card type, last four digits of the card, authorization code, amount charged, and payment status.
